use_cases: Interactive hero section with responsive shader effects that follow cursor movement
Animated decorative element for landing pages and marketing sites
Visually engaging loading state or transition component
Creative background accent for digital products and portfolios
Atmospheric visual element for immersive web experiences
ai_summary: An interactive shader-based SVG component featuring animated mesh gradients with mouse-tracking responsiveness. The component combines framer-motion floating animations with real-time cursor position analysis to create depth and parallax-like effects. Uses @paper-design/shaders-react for GPU-accelerated gradient rendering, resulting in a soft, ethereal 3D-like visual suitable for creative and SaaS applications.
